reason: Check source of truth: verify implementation against MVP requirements, acceptance criteria, defaults, and out-of-scope boundaries.
Verify UI/UX against TrackWrite design constraints: calm native Android feel, accessible states, no decorative gradients/glassmorphism/cyberpunk dashboard patterns.
Verify user workflow, safety expectations, accessibility principles, and photography-first product behavior.
Verify AMap setup, key/permission/privacy configuration, ProGuard notes, and provider-boundary implementation details.
Verify foreground-service recording behavior, permission handling, process-recovery scope, and power-conscious location strategy.
Verify photo source handling, scoped-storage safety, original-preserving export path, explicit in-place mutation grants, per-photo failures, and post-write EXIF verification.
Verify AMap provider decision, search/map scope, and coordinate/provider boundary assumptions.
Check data flow across UI, services, storage, GPX, matching, EXIF, and map provider adapters for boundary drift and format mismatches.
Check for unnecessary duplicated constants/utilities/configuration and ensure implementation searched existing project patterns first.
